## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Which phase or component does it relate to?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why were they ruled out?

## Implementation Notes

- Which files or components would need to change?
- Does this require new infrastructure (AWS resources, Helm charts)?
- Would this affect the ArgoCD app-of-apps pattern?
